# Dottle — AI Agent Failure Detection
# https://dottle.dev
# llms.txt standard: https://llmstxt.org

## What is Dottle?
Dottle is a production monitoring platform for AI agents. It detects silent failures, infinite loops, tool errors, and behavioral drift automatically — without requiring manual thresholds or configuration.

## Core problems Dottle solves
- Silent agent failures: the agent runs, returns a response, but the output is wrong or hallucinated
- Infinite loops: agent gets stuck calling the same tools repeatedly
- Tool failures: API timeouts, null returns, or errors that pass silently through the agent
- Behavioral drift: the agent starts refusing tasks or responding differently than before
- Latency spikes: p95 latency crossing SLA thresholds
- Cost anomalies: one tenant burning 40× their normal token budget

## How it works
1. Install the Dottle SDK (pip install dottle or npm i @dottle/sdk)
2. Wrap your agent entrypoint with @dottle.trace
3. Dottle instruments every tool call, LLM call, and control-flow decision automatically
4. Failures are detected, root causes are explained, and the right person is alerted

## Integrations
- LangChain
- LangGraph
- OpenAI Agents SDK
- Custom Python and TypeScript agents

## Pricing
- Hobby: Free — 10,000 traces/month, 3-day retention
- Team: $199/month — 1M traces/month, 30-day retention, Slack + PagerDuty alerts, A/B prompt testing
- Enterprise: Custom — unlimited volume, self-hosted option, SAML + SCIM
